summary: Classified the five hydrated open PRs independently as a live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was invented, no security-sensitive items were detected, and no close/merge/fix action is safe or allowed from this job.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR remains open for proof/review; it is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or security-sensitive item.
Large provider hardening PR needs proof and review follow-up; it should not be closed as low-signal or treated as a duplicate in this shard.
Maintainer judgment is required for whether the config/default behavior and remaining review state are acceptable; no autonomous close or merge is allowed.
Useful but unproven Telegram behavior PR remains open for proof/review; it is not closable under this inventory job.
Maintainer review is the exact remaining decision; no autonomous close or merge is permitted by this job.

needs_human: #72009 requires maintainer judgment on configurable typing TTL readiness and remaining review state.
#73785 requires maintainer review on heartbeat/system-event no-op suppression behavior.
